diagnoses.symptoms: Dark water-soaked spots on leaves that turn brown and shrivel. White fuzzy growth appears on the undersides of leaves in humid conditions. Highly affected leaf edges and lower stems.
diagnoses.organicRemedies: Remove and destroy all infected plant parts. Apply copper-based organic fungicides. Improve air circulation by pruning and spacing plants. Water at the base, not on leaves.
diagnoses.chemicalRemedies: Apply Chlorothalonil or Mancozeb fungicide according to package instructions at 7-10 day intervals. Use systemic fungicides like Metalaxyl for active outbreaks.
diagnoses.fertilizerRecommendations: Avoid high nitrogen fertilizers as they encourage dense, blight-susceptible foliage. Use balanced fertilizers with high potassium (e.g., NPK 5-10-10) to boost fruit immunity.
diagnoses.irrigationRecommendations: Reduce watering frequency and transition to early morning drip irrigation. Do not overhead water as wet leaves accelerate fungal spread.
diagnoses.weatherSummary: Currently Clear at 36.6°C. Forecast indicates a max rain probability of 59% today.
diagnoses.riskAlerts: No severe weather-related risks predicted for the coming days.
diagnoses.recommendedMedicine: Chlorothalonil 75% WP, Dosage: 2g/liter of water. Method: Foliar spray. Safety: Wear protective gloves and mask. Waiting period: 7 days.
diagnoses.marketPrices: Manchar Mandi: Modal price of ₹2700/Quintal (Range: ₹2200 - ₹3200). Daily change: 8.7%. Best sell strategy: sell at market peak when price is above ₹2700.
diagnoses.governmentSchemes: Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi (PM-KISAN) (Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare, Govt of India): Direct financial assistance of ₹6,000 per year, paid in three equal installments of ₹2,000 directly into bank accounts.; Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY) (Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare, Govt of India): Comprehensive crop insurance covering risk of yield loss from non-preventable risks (drought, flood, pests, diseases). Low farmer premium: 1.5% for Rabi, 2% for Kharif, 5% for commercial crops.
diagnoses.preventiveTips: Sanitize farming tools. Practice crop rotation with non-solanaceous crops next season. Maintain 2-3 feet spacing between plants.
diagnoses.nextRecommendedAction: Prune the lowest infected leaves immediately and apply a copper-based fungicide before the next rain.
